description: Add backend service routes in apps/quantads/backend for the quant-economy API endpoints. Fastify routes following the pattern in apps/quantads/backend/routes/campaigns.ts - using zod validation, service instantiation, and proper error handling.
steps: Create apps/quantads/backend/routes/economy.ts - Fastify route plugin with endpoints: POST /economy/wallet (create wallet), GET /economy/wallet/:userId (get balance), POST /economy/wallet/buy (buy coins), POST /economy/wallet/earn/daily (claim daily login), POST /economy/wallet/earn/referral (claim referral bonus)

Create apps/quantads/backend/routes/store.ts - Fastify route plugin with endpoints: GET /store/catalog (list items with optional category filter), POST /store/purchase (purchase item with coins), GET /store/inventory/:userId (get user inventory)

Create apps/quantads/backend/routes/creator-economy.ts - Fastify route plugin with endpoints: POST /creator/listing (create listing), GET /creator/listings/:creatorId (get creator listings), GET /creator/marketplace (browse all listings), POST /creator/payout (request cash-out), GET /creator/earnings/:creatorId (get earnings)

Create apps/quantads/backend/routes/boost.ts - Fastify route plugin with endpoints: GET /boost/packs (list boost packs), POST /boost/activate (boost a post), GET /boost/analytics/:boostId (get boost stats), GET /boost/active/:userId (get user active boosts)

Create apps/quantads/backend/routes/subscriptions.ts - Fastify route plugin with endpoints: POST /subscriptions/subscribe (subscribe to tier), POST /subscriptions/upgrade (upgrade tier), GET /subscriptions/current/:userId (get current subscription), GET /subscriptions/entitlements/:userId (check entitlements)

Create apps/quantads/backend/routes/gifting.ts - Fastify route plugin with endpoints: POST /gifting/send (send gift), POST /gifting/tip (send tip), GET /gifting/received/:userId (get received gifts), GET /gifting/tips/:userId (get tips received)
Register all new routes in apps/quantads/backend/app.ts with appropriate prefixes
Verify the quantads app type-checks with the new backend routes: pnpm --filter @quant/quantads typecheck
acceptance_criteria: All route files exist in apps/quantads/backend/routes/
Routes follow the existing pattern: zod schema validation, service instantiation, error handling with createAppError
Each route handler validates input with zod and returns structured responses
